title: scutellaria orientalis subsp. cretacea
intro: Scutellaria orientalis subsp. cretacea, also known as Balkan skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria orientalis plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria orientalis subsp. cretacea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
